heading: Omitted
label: 941c Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which authorized appropriation and provided for disbursement of funds in accordance with the settlement agreement, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 103–116, § 5107 Stat. 1122Oct. 27, 1993
